case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER RELEASING PROPERTY PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SEC 1536 & ORDER TO DEPOSIT MONEY FILED BY PETITIONER

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION 4,903.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 THORUGH 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER TO PAYOUT MONEY FILED BY PETITIONER

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $4,903.00 US CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO ATTY RANDALL KNOX ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT LOAN K LY. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FUTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE CASE IS MUTUALLY WIAVED BY BOTH PARTIES - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
